sentences.translation: Asma radi kao dizajnerica web stranica.
sentences.translationEn: Asma works as a website designer.

sentences.translation: Dizajnira stranice i bira odgovarajuće boje.
sentences.translationEn: She designs pages and chooses suitable colours.

sentences.arabic: تُرْسِلُ الْعَمَلَ إِلَى الزَّبُونِ وَتَنْتَظِرُ رَأْيَهُ.
sentences.translation: Šalje posao klijentu i čeka njegovo mišljenje.
sentences.translationEn: She sends the work to the client and waits for their opinion.

sentences.arabic: تُعَدِّلُ مَا يَطْلُبُهُ الزَّبُونُ حَتَّى يَرْضَى.
sentences.translation: Mijenja ono što klijent traži dok ne bude zadovoljan.
sentences.translationEn: She changes what the client requests until they are satisfied.
